sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (a String, b UInt32, c DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;

SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32, c DateTime', $${"a": "Hello", "b": 111, "c": "2023-01-01 00:00:00"}{"a": "World", "b": 123, "c": "2023-01-02 00:00:00"}${$}{"a": NULL, "b": 0, "c": NULL}$) AS json_format WHERE b GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT b FROM test_data WHERE a IS NOT NULL) HAVING json_format.b >= 100;

SELECT a FROM (SELECT a, count(*) as cnt FROM (SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt8', $${"a": "EmptyString", "b": 0}$$) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM test_data) GROUP BY a HAVING cnt > 1) AS grouped_data GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT a FROM test_data WHERE b < 150);
CREATE TABLE temp_data (d Nullable(String), e Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT a, b + nested_val FROM (SELECT a, b, c, floor(c) as nested_val FROM test_data) WHERE a GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT a FROM temp_data) HAVING nested_val IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE boundary_table (x DateTime, y Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;

SELECT * FROM format(CSV, 'x DateTime, y Int32', '2023-01-01 00:00:00, 1
2023-01-31 23:59:59, 2147483647
2023-02-01 00:00:00, -2147483648
') WHERE y GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT y FROM boundary_table WHERE x > '2023-01-01');
